text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 16 

DRUG_STUS_IND 

LABEL: Drug Status Indicator of Manufacturer Discount 

DESCRIPTION: This field indicates whether the NDC for PDE was considered an applicable drug, non-applicable drug, 
or selected drug by CMS at the time of PDE processing for purposes of manufacturer 
discount/selected drug applicability and reinsurance calculations. 

SHORT NAME:
